$comment: scripts/ViridianMart.asm — the parcel errand, FULLY AUTHORED (wave C): on the first visit after getting a starter the clerk calls you over, walks you to the counter front (the cell two east of him, never ON the counter), hands over OAK's PARCEL with the key-item fanfare, and the flag arms Oak's delivery branch.

trigger.when: GOT_STARTER and not GOT_OAKS_PARCEL and not OAK_GOT_PARCEL

commands.text:
Hey! You came from
PALLET TOWN?

You know PROF.
OAK, right? His order came in.
Will you take it
to him?
